name: ZOL Weekly Curator - Recap Loop
purpose: Once per week, review ZOL's last 7 days of posted casts and Bonfire context, select the best find of the week, draft a weekly recap cast, stage it for Zaal's approval. Never auto-posts - always draft-only.

capability_identity.name: zol-weekly-curator-v1
integration_points: state store (recent-casts.json read, drafted recap write)
bonfire (weekly recall queries for ZAO context)
capability_identity.mission: Surface ZOL's best musical find of the week, contextualized by ZAO ecosystem activity, as a weekly recap for Zaal to review and post
capability_identity.operational_context: Low-risk, zero auto-sends, humans-in-the-loop always, reads only public cast history and shared knowledge graphs

collect.description: Read last 7 days of ZOL casts

contextualize.description: Query Bonfire for weekly ZAO ecosystem context
contextualize.action: recall query for standout tracks and artist wins

highlight.description: Select the single best find of the week

stage.description: Write draft to state for human approval

configuration_references.note: Feature flags control loop activation. State is read from recent-casts.json and Bonfire; drafts written to local state and ~/zol/drafts/ for manual approval.
